sample.sample: The sample size for the given activity, indicating the number of participants in the study.

hours.hours: The average number of hours spent on the activity by the participants, providing a quantitative measure of engagement.

year.year: The year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each row.

total.total: The total count or sum for the given year, representing the combined value of both foreign and local data.

foreign.foreign: The count or sum of foreign-related data for the given year, representing the portion attributed to foreign sources.

local.local: The count or sum of local-related data for the given year, representing the portion attributed to local sources.

year.year: The year in which the design filings were recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

design_class.design_class: The category of the design filings, representing the main subject of the dataset.

design_filings.design_filings: The number of design filings recorded for a specific design class in a given year, measuring the volume of activity.

rank.rank: The ranking of the design class based on the number of filings in a specific year, providing a relative measure of importance.

year.year: The year in which the design filings were recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

applicant_country.applicant_country: The country that is filing the designs, serving as the primary entity being measured.

design_filings.design_filings: The number of design filings made by the applicant_country in the specified year, quantifying the design activity of the country.

rank.rank: The ranking of the applicant_country based on the number of design filings in the specified year, categorizing the country's position relative to others.

year.year: The year in which the operating expenditure occurred, providing a temporal context for the data.

level_1.level_1: A high-level classification of the expenditure type, which is consistently 'Operating Expenditure' in this dataset.

level_2.level_2: The specific category of the operating expenditure, such as 'Changes In Inventory,' 'Royalties,' etc., serving as the primary subject of the data.

value.value: The monetary amount of the operating expenditure for the specific category in the given year, measured in currency units.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the annual leave entitlement distribution.

type_of_employee.type_of_employee: The classification of the employee type, distinguishing between management and executive and rank-and-file employees.

annual_leave_entitlement.annual_leave_entitlement: The range of annual leave entitlement for the employees, categorized into specific intervals (e.g., 14 days & below, 15 to 21 days, over 21 days).

distribution.distribution: The percentage distribution of employees within the specified annual leave entitlement category, indicating the proportion of employees in each category.

year.year: The year when the water quality measurement was taken, providing a temporal context for the data.

water_quality_parameter.water_quality_parameter: The specific water quality parameter being measured, such as chemical compounds or physical properties of the water.

average_value.average_value: The average value of the water quality parameter measured in the specified year, indicating the concentration or level of the parameter.

unit.unit: The unit of measurement for the average_value, specifying how the parameter is quantified.

year.year: The year in which the enrollment data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the dataset.

stream.stream: The type of educational stream, categorizing the educational program (e.g., Extd for Extended, Mono for Monolingual).

sex.sex: The gender of the students, categorizing the demographic (e.g., MF for Mixed, F for Female, M for Male).

enrolment_pri_7.enrolment_pri_7: The number of students enrolled in primary grade 7 for the specified year, stream, and gender, serving as a quantitative measure of student enrollment.

year.year: The year in which the marriage data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the dataset.

level_1.level_1: The age group of brides, categorizing the data by the bride's age range.

level_2.level_2: The age group of grooms, categorizing the data by the groom's age range.

value.value: The number of marriages recorded for the specified combination of bride and groom age groups in the given year.

month.month: The month and year when the measurement was taken, indicating the time period for the data.

level_1.level_1: A high-level category that groups the data, providing a broad classification.

level_2.level_2: A sub-category that further specifies the type of data within the high-level category.

value.value: The measured value associated with the specific combination of 'month', 'level_1', and 'level_2', representing the core metric of interest.

quarter.quarter: The quarter in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the measurements.

level_1.level_1: The category or sector of the wholesale trade, serving as the primary subject of the record.

value.value: The numeric value associated with the sector in the specified quarter, likely representing a performance metric such as sales or revenue.

quarter.quarter: The quarter in which the data is recorded, indicating the time period for the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The sector being measured, which is consistently 'Total Services Sector' in this dataset.

value.value: The numeric value representing the metric being tracked for the specified quarter and sector.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the financial data is recorded, serving as the primary key to uniquely identify each row.

operating_expenditure.operating_expenditure: The amount spent on operating activities during the specified financial year, representing the operational costs.

development_expenditure.development_expenditure: The amount spent on development activities during the specified financial year, representing investments in growth and improvement.

government_health_expenditure.government_health_expenditure: The total amount spent by the government on health services during the specified financial year, representing public health spending.

percentage_gdp.percentage_gdp: The percentage of the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) allocated to health expenditure during the specified financial year, indicating the relative importance of health spending in the economy.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year during which the financial data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: A categorical attribute indicating whether the financial data is actual, revised, or estimated, providing context on the data's status.

class.class: A categorical attribute classifying the type of financial data (e.g., Tax, Fees and Charges, Others), grouping similar types of financial records.

type.type: A categorical attribute specifying the specific type of financial data within the class (e.g., Personal Income Tax, Corporate Income Tax), providing detailed classification.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the financial data, measured in the local currency, representing the financial impact.

percent_of_gdp.percent_of_gdp: The percentage of the financial data relative to the Gross Domestic Product (GDP), providing a proportional measure of the financial impact.

car_park_no.car_park_no: A unique identifier for each car park, serving as the primary key for tracking individual car parks.

address.address: The physical address of the car park, providing the location details.

x_coord.x_coord: The X-coordinate of the car park's location, used for geographical mapping.

y_coord.y_coord: The Y-coordinate of the car park's location, used for geographical mapping.

car_park_type.car_park_type: The type of car park, categorizing it as surface, multi-storey, or basement.

type_of_parking_system.type_of_parking_system: The parking system used at the car park, such as electronic or coupon-based.

short_term_parking.short_term_parking: Indicates whether short-term parking is available at the car park.

free_parking.free_parking: Indicates whether free parking is available at the car park.

night_parking.night_parking: Indicates whether night parking is available at the car park.

car_park_decks.car_park_decks: The number of decks in the car park, indicating its capacity.

gantry_height.gantry_height: The height of the gantry at the car park, specifying the clearance for vehicles.

car_park_basement.car_park_basement: Indicates whether the car park has a basement level.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the observations.

facility_type_a.facility_type_a: The type of healthcare facility, categorizing the setting where the data is collected.

sex.sex: The gender of the population being measured, classifying the data by male or female.

age.age: The age group of the population being measured, categorizing the data into different age ranges.

rate.rate: The rate of a specific metric (such as admissions or utilization) for the given combination of year, facility type, sex, and age, providing a quantitative measure of the data.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, serving as the temporal identifier for each data point.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of data being measured, which in this case is consistently 'Total Licensed Food Establishments'.

value.value: The numerical value representing the count of total licensed food establishments for the specified year.

buildingname.buildingname: The name of the building, serving as the primary identifier for each entry.

buildingaddress.buildingaddress: The physical address of the building, providing its location.

buildingtype.buildingtype: The type of the building, categorizing it into different classes such as Hotel, Office, Retail, etc.

greenmarkstatus.greenmarkstatus: The Green Mark status of the building, indicating whether it has received a Green Mark certification.

buildingsize.buildingsize: The size classification of the building, categorizing it as Small, Large, etc.

grossfloorarea.grossfloorarea: The total gross floor area of the building, measured in square meters.

voluntarydisclosure.voluntarydisclosure: Indicates whether the energy use data was voluntarily disclosed by the building owner, represented as 'Y' for Yes and 'N' for No.

year.year: The year in which the legal process or case occurred, providing a temporal context for the data.

justice_division.justice_division: The division of the justice system involved in the legal process or case, categorizing the type of legal activity.

category.category: The broad category of the legal process or case, further specifying the type of legal activity within the justice division.

subcategory.subcategory: The specific type of legal process or case, providing detailed information about the nature of the legal activity within the category.

count.count: The number of occurrences of the specific legal process or case in the given year, quantifying the frequency of the legal activity.

year.year: The year in which the development status was recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

type_of_space.type_of_space: The category of space being developed, such as Office Space or Retail Space, serving as the primary subject of the table.

development_status.development_status: The current stage of development for the space, categorized into different statuses like Planned - Others, Under Construction, etc.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: The amount of space (in square meters or similar units) associated with the development, indicating the size of the project.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the measurements.

level_1.level_1: A broad classification category that groups the data into major categories such as 'Corporation & Individual'.

level_2.level_2: A more specific sub-category within level_1, providing detailed classifications such as 'Arts & Heritage', 'Social & Welfare', etc.

value.value: The quantitative value associated with the combination of year, level_1, and level_2, representing the measured amount or metric.

month.month: The specific month and year when the data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The category of the data being measured, which in this case is always 'Number Of Air Passenger Departures'.

level_2.level_2: The geographical region associated with the data, categorizing the data by different parts of the world.

value.value: The number of air passenger departures for the specified month and region, representing the quantitative measurement.

month.month: The specific month and year of the financial data, serving as the primary key for each record.

total_foreign_reserve_sgd.total_foreign_reserve_sgd: The total amount of foreign reserves held by the country in Singapore Dollars (SGD), measured at the end of the specified month.

special_drawing_rights.special_drawing_rights: The amount of Special Drawing Rights (SDRs) held by the country, measured at the end of the specified month.

imf_reserve_position.imf_reserve_position: The country's reserve position in the International Monetary Fund (IMF), measured at the end of the specified month.

gold_and_foreign_exchange.gold_and_foreign_exchange: The total amount of gold and foreign exchange reserves held by the country, measured at the end of the specified month.

total_foreign_reserve_usd.total_foreign_reserve_usd: The total amount of foreign reserves held by the country in US Dollars (USD), measured at the end of the specified month.

month.month: The month and year when the energy consumption was measured, indicating the time period of the data.

housing_type.housing_type: The type of housing (e.g., Public Housing, Private Housing, Others) for which the energy consumption is recorded, categorizing the main subject.

dwelling_type.dwelling_type: The specific type of dwelling within the housing type (e.g., 1-Room / 2-Room, 4-Room, Landed Properties), further classifying the main subject.

tg_consumption_gwh.tg_consumption_gwh: The energy consumption in gigawatt-hours (GWh) for the specified month, housing type, and dwelling type, representing the primary measurement of interest.

year.year: The year in which the net enrolment rate was measured, providing a temporal context for the data.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational level (e.g., primary, lower secondary, upper secondary) for which the net enrolment rate is reported, categorizing the data by educational stage.

sex.sex: The gender (M, F, MF) for which the net enrolment rate is reported, categorizing the data by gender.

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The net enrolment rate for the specified year, level of education, and gender, representing the percentage of the relevant age group enrolled in the specified educational level.

year.year: The year in which the vaccination doses were administered, providing a temporal context for the data.

vaccination_type.vaccination_type: The type of vaccination, categorizing the specific vaccine being tracked.

no_of_doses_in_thousands.no_of_doses_in_thousands: The number of doses administered in thousands, quantifying the scale of the vaccination program for the given year and type.

month.month: The specific month and year when the data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurement.

level_1.level_1: A broad classification category for the data, providing a high-level grouping (e.g., 'Total International Visitor Arrivals By Country Of Residence').

level_2.level_2: A mid-level classification category that further refines the data, typically by continent (e.g., Europe, Asia).

level_3.level_3: A detailed classification category that provides the most specific grouping, typically by country or region within the continent.

value.value: The number of international visitor arrivals for the specified month and classification levels, representing the core metric of the dataset.

month.month: The specific month and year when the measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for the data.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of measurement, such as 'Total Mail,' which classifies the data point.

value.value: The quantitative measurement associated with the combination of month and level_1, representing the value of interest (e.g., the total mail volume).

year.year: The year when the wage data was collected, providing a temporal context for the occupation statistics.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The description of the occupation, serving as the primary identifier for the type of job being analyzed.

estab_size1.estab_size1: A broad category indicating the size of the establishments where the occupation is found, such as 'all' or 'large'.

estab_size2.estab_size2: A more specific category indicating the detailed size range of the establishments, such as 'less than 200 employees' or 'at least 200 employees'.

age_grp1.age_grp1: The age group of the employees in the occupation, categorizing them into ranges like '25-29' or '30-39'.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile of the monthly gross wage for the occupation, representing the median gross pay.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile of the monthly basic wage for the occupation, representing the median base pay.

year.year: The year when the wage statistics were recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The description of the occupation, serving as the primary identifier for the data.

ind1.ind1: A broad industry classification for the occupation, categorizing the type of industry.

ind2.ind2: A detailed industry classification for the occupation, providing more specific industry information.

mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of monthly gross wages for the occupation, indicating the upper quartile of earnings.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of monthly gross wages for the occupation, indicating the middle value of earnings.

mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of monthly gross wages for the occupation, indicating the lower quartile of earnings.

mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of monthly basic wages for the occupation, indicating the upper quartile of base salaries.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of monthly basic wages for the occupation, indicating the middle value of base salaries.

mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of monthly basic wages for the occupation, indicating the lower quartile of base salaries.
